name: OnAREthMessage
title: OnAREthMessage
description: This callback function can be implemented in the CAPL program to be notified when a SOME/IP message is received.
The function is called for all those SOME/IP messages that are received on the local Application Endpoint of the IL, see AREthOpenLocalApplicationEndpoint.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the received SOME/IP message.
